first_run.rationale: The score remains identical, and the core justification and strengths are fundamentally the same, focusing on the candidate's extensive experience, alignment with the tech stack, and AI work. The minor differences in the wording of strengths and the specific secondary concerns listed (e.g., Python/PostgreSQL vs. Kotlin/Python/Security) are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any judgment based on the change of work location from Europe/North America to Brazil.
